title: telemetry — subprocessors
description: Telemetry data (span attributes, metric labels, log records) leaves the application via OTLP + Monolog sinks. Where the collector / sink is third-party-hosted, that vendor is a subprocessor. Self-hosted collectors on our infra are NOT subprocessors.

subprocessors.name: Grafana Cloud (Tempo + Mimir + Loki)
subprocessors.purpose: Trace + metric + log storage + query UI.
subprocessors.when_engaged: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT points at grafana.net OR telemetry.logs.sinks.loki.endpoint points at grafana.net

subprocessors.name: DataDog (APM + Logs + Metrics)
subprocessors.purpose: APM + metrics + dashboards + log ingestion / search.
subprocessors.when_engaged: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT points at datadoghq.com OR telemetry.logs.sinks.datadog.enabled=true

notes: The choice of subprocessor is deployment-specific. Multiple can be configured via a fan-out collector (OTel Collector `otlp` receiver → multiple `otlp` exporters).
Self-hosted collectors (Grafana Alloy, OTel Collector on our own K8s, DataDog Agent sidecar) are NOT subprocessors per GDPR Art. 28 — we control them; they are transport, not processing.
